items.briefing:
Cybercriminals are now using AI tools to automatically test whether their malware can bypass security software, making attacks harder to detect and faster to deploy — a concern for all organisations relying on endpoint protection. Separately, researchers have found that malicious browser notifications can be used to manipulate Google Gemini AI users, potentially feeding them false or harmful information.

Australian organisations reviewing their cyber insurance should be aware that while premiums are falling, insurers are broadening exclusions — meaning less may actually be covered when a claim is made. Review your policy carefully to understand what incidents are no longer included.

**Tip:** Check your cyber insurance policy for any new exclusions before your next renewal.

featured.title: Most under-16s still using social media despite ban
featured.quote: Australian social media ban for under-16s is ineffective, creating urgent policy and parental safety concerns.
